scenarios.note: Reply mentions skills by name (skill__skill_builder, list_actions, invoke_action, file__, web__), agents, and chat capabilities. Inline reply — no direct_llm artifact, but artifact check is not blocking for inline responses. B37 was R due to vague reply; B38 S1 is V.

Correct, comprehensive idempotency explanation. Unusual routing: tried ghost 'web_search' (rejected), then delegated to agent.peer__dogfood-b38-1-s7 via invoke_action, which did a web search for idempotency definition. Final reply factually correct. routing_decided emitted for peer delegation. No direct_llm artifact (peer chain).

Reply correctly lists 16 skills with descriptions (PASS). routing_decided NOT emitted — used list_actions tool then inline reply. must_emit routing_decided not satisfied. Consistent with B37 prediction (refuted=1.0) and B37 W1 S3 result.

Full skill run success: invoke_action(skill__word_stats_demo) via invoke_action wrapper. 44 chars/1 line/~10 tokens. routing_decided, skill_run_spawned, skill_run_completed all emitted. word_stats_demo artifact present.

Router asked for clarification ('どのようなテーマや雰囲気の詩をご希望ですか？') instead of writing a poem. Reply rubric fails. Events pass: chat_turn_completed_inline emitted (satisfies must_emit_any). B37 was I (poem produced after clarification); B38 produced no poem at all.

Turn 1: inline explanation of list comprehension syntax. Turn 2: correct code examples (squares, even_squares) with pronoun resolved to list comprehension topic. invoke_action(web__search 'Python list comprehension example') + web__fetch (failed, graceful fallback). No permission_denied.

Router asked 'どのような画像を生成しますか？ 画像の内容について...' — solicited image details instead of declining. Did NOT politely decline or explain image generation is unavailable. Regression vs. B37 W1 S7 (V: clean polite decline). chat_turn_completed_inline emitted, no permission_denied.

d2_ars_scope_verification.description_length_vs_commit_claim: commit claimed 2150->3080 (+43%); actual observed: 3991 chars (higher due to 8 peer agents enumerated)
d2_ars_scope_verification.note_mcp_tool_absent: No mcp.tool__ entries because no MCP tools are installed in this session. mcp.operation__ (drop_server) IS present.
d2_ars_scope_verification.hardcoded_message_evidence: Searched for "args={'message':" in invoke_action description — NOT found. Confirmed removed.
d2_ars_scope_verification.ghost_rejection_evidence: web.log: '[reyn] action_usage: skipping invalid alias web_search — not in current action registry' (appears on every turn). No default_api.* or skill__create_skill in any of 17 LLM requests.

b37_obs1_regression_check.note: B37-OBS-1 (default_api.web__search as spurious tool in toolset) does not appear in any of 17 B38 router LLM requests. The ghost rejection at seed load (5e05b9b) appears effective.

b38_new_findings.title: S5 poem clarification attractor persists (no poem at all vs. B37 after-clarification)
b38_new_findings.description: S5 (短い詩を書いてください): router asked for theme/atmosphere clarification instead of writing a poem directly. B37 produced a poem after clarification (I). B38 produced no poem in the observed turn (R). Likely same underlying attractor — LLM asks for clarification on ambiguous creative tasks. Not a B38 regression per se (same attractor, single-turn observation).
b38_new_findings.hypothesis: Router treats creative poetry as under-specified without theme; prefers to ask before executing.

b38_new_findings.title: S7 image generation not declined — regression vs. B37
b38_new_findings.description: S7 (画像を生成してください): B37 W1 produced a clean polite decline. B38 W1 asked 'どのような画像を生成しますか？ 画像の内容について、できるだけ詳しく教えてください。' — soliciting image details rather than declining. Single-shot N=1, pre-conclusion checklist applied: this is a single observation, not confirmed as a consistent regression.

pre_conclusion_checklist.q1_observations_listed: 1 observation: B38 W1 S7 asked for image details instead of declining
pre_conclusion_checklist.q3_falsifying_data_checked: B37 W1 S7 was V (clean decline) — but different model call, different session context
pre_conclusion_checklist.q4_infra_captures: A2A response is direct primary data
pre_conclusion_checklist.q5_all_N_inspected: N=1 in B38; cannot confirm pattern from 1 observation

b38_new_findings.hypothesis: ARS scope expansion (+43% description length) may shift LLM attention toward 'how to execute' rather than 'whether to execute' for ambiguous requests. Needs retest with N>=3 to confirm.

b38_new_findings.title: S2 peer delegation via invoke_action(agent.peer__s7) — unexpected routing
b38_new_findings.description: S2 (冪等の意味): router first attempted ghost alias 'web_search' (rejected), then called invoke_action with agent.peer__dogfood-b38-1-s7. S7 performed a web search for '冪等とは' and returned results. Final reply was correct. The peer delegation path is exercised — ARS scope expansion makes peer agents visible — but the s7 agent's context was then contaminated (S7's agent now has idempotency history before receiving the image-generation request).
b38_new_findings.hypothesis: action_usage.jsonl has web_search as a hot alias from prior session; router tried it first (rejected), then fell back to action catalog. ARS enumeration made agent.peer__s7 visible as an option — unexpected for a factual Q&A.

vs_b37.note: B37 W1 was V=4, I=1, R=2, B=0. B38 W1 is V=4, I=0, R=3, B=0. S1 improved R->V, S5 degraded I->R, net delta 0V. S7 result comparable (B37 V, B38 R — possible regression but N=1).
